typography.instructions: Import 'Outfit' and 'Tajawal' from Google Fonts. Use 'Outfit' for all headings (font-black or font-light for contrast). Use 'Inter' or 'Tajawal' for body text depending on active language. CRITICAL: Never use Inter for headings.

colors.instructions: Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use the tinted dark blues provided. For buttons, use the accent primary color.

rtl_guidelines: CRITICAL: Always use logical properties for spacing and alignment. Use 'ms-*' (margin-start), 'me-*' (margin-end), 'ps-*', 'pe-*'.
Ensure the HTML root or App wrapper sets 'dir="rtl"' or 'dir="ltr"' based on the language toggle.
Icons indicating direction (like arrows) must be mirrored in RTL mode using 'rtl:rotate-180'.
spacing: Use massive spacing for sections: 'py-24 md:py-32'.
Never cramp content. Use 'gap-8', 'gap-12', or 'gap-16' in flex/grid layouts.
grids: Bento Grid for Services: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6.
Avoid 100% symmetrical grids. Create visual tension.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used for the sticky header and floating navigational elements. Apply 'backdrop-blur-xl', 'bg-[#060B12]/80', and a subtle 1px bottom border 'border-white/10'.
visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use subtle radial gradients behind main components to simulate light emission from the accent colors (e.g., cyan glow behind the hero section).
visual_enhancers.noise_texture: Optionally overlay a very subtle fixed SVG noise texture (opacity 2-3%) across the entire site to remove the digital flatness.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped or slightly rounded (rounded-full or rounded-lg). Background: primary accent. Text: black. Hover: scale-up slightly and increase glow.
components.cards: Flat, dark, slight glass effect. No heavy box-shadows; rely on 1px borders (border-white/10) to define edges.
components.inputs: Shadcn input components modified to have dark backgrounds (bg-white/5), white text, and an accent-colored ring on focus. NO native HTML inputs.
components.language_switcher: A crisp toggle in the navbar. Must trigger a global state change that updates language strings and the 'dir' attribute on the root.

motion.guidelines: Use framer-motion for smooth entrance animations. Stagger lists (like Services and Portfolio items).
motion.hover: All interactive elements MUST have hover states (e.g., border color changes, slight translation).
motion.scroll: Implement smooth scrolling for anchor links.

image_urls.description: Abstract wavy lines on dark background. Use with low opacity or mask to create a tech-vibe hero.
Abstract purple strands twisting. Good for 'Custom Software Solutions' card.
Computer screen displaying lines of code. Good for 'Web Development' card.
Team of developers working in a modern office.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text, especially 'text-slate-400', meets the 4.5:1 WCAG contrast ratio against the dark backgrounds.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='lang-switch-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup standard React + Tailwind + Shadcn/ui project.
2. Add a global language state (Context or Zustand) supporting 'en' and 'ar'.
3. Map the 'dir' attribute to 'ltr' or 'rtl' dynamically on the main container.
4. Add fonts 'Outfit' and 'Tajawal' from Google Fonts to index.html or layout.
5. Use Framer Motion for scroll reveals and hover micro-interactions.
6. Build the following sections: Hero, About, Services (Bento grid), Portfolio, Team, Testimonials, Contact.
7. Create a form in the Contact section that saves to the provided MongoDB database schema.
8. Strictly follow the Logical CSS properties (start/end) for padding, margin, and text-alignment to ensure the RTL flip works automatically without duplicating layouts.
9. Use Lucide React icons. Flip directional icons when in RTL.
10. Make sure to use named exports for components and default exports for pages.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not apply universal transitions like 'transition: all'. Target specific properties.
Do not center align the app container text globally.
Never use AI assistant emoji characters for icons.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Do not use transparent backgrounds under dropdowns or modals - use the glassmorphism surface specified.
